classObjective: Determine whether a figure has rotational symmetry and justify the answer.
workedExamples: 13-6, Example 2 — Determine Rotational Symmetry in Real-World Objects
13-6, Example 3 — Determine Order and Magnitude of Rotational Symmetry
warmUp: What is the difference between rotational symmetry of order 2 and point symmetry?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: order = 360° ÷ magnitude; point symmetry (order 2 at 180°); determining rotational symmetry
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice determining rotational symmetry and order
independentPractice: Practice problems determining whether figures have rotational symmetry and finding order/magnitude
assessment: Exit ticket: determine whether a square has rotational symmetry and find its order
capReflection: How does understanding rotational symmetry help you analyze real-world objects like wheels and gears?
